theme_and_archetype.rationale: Developer tool and AI tracing dashboard require authority, clarity, and truth-first design. The Swiss archetype provides objective, rigid, functional aesthetics prioritizing data visibility over decoration.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-1 to p-12), highly dense for developer tool. Generous padding inside empty states.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense). 3-pane IDE layout. Screen height is 100vh locked.

structure.app_container: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-white text-zinc-900
structure.left_sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-200 flex flex-col bg-zinc-50 shrink-0
structure.main_center: flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 border-r border-zinc-200

layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Explicit 1px solid borders separating all functional zones. Minimal shadow, flat backgrounds. Max border-radius: 4px (rounded-sm) for a sharp, authoritative feel.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00227A] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-200 border border-zinc-200 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

agent_trace_node.container: relative p-3 border border-zinc-200 rounded-sm bg-white shadow-sm flex items-start gap-3

code_editor.container: font-mono text-sm bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-50 p-4 overflow-auto relative rounded-sm

schema_tree.database_item: flex items-center gap-2 px-2 py-1.5 hover:bg-zinc-100 cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium text-zinc-800
schema_tree.table_item: flex items-center gap-2 pl-6 pr-2 py-1 hover:bg-zinc-100 cursor-pointer text-sm text-zinc-700
schema_tree.column_item: flex items-center justify-between pl-10 pr-2 py-0.5 text-xs text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-900

chat_input.input: w-full pl-4 pr-12 py-3 rounded-sm border border-zinc-300 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-400 bg-zinc-50

shadcn_overrides.tab_trigger: rounded-none data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-[#002FA7] data-[state=active]:shadow-none px-4 py-2

motion_and_interactions.trace_animation: Use Framer Motion to animate the trace line connecting agent nodes. 'Tracing Beam' effect on active agent node.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp background changes (bg-zinc-100) and text color shifts. Fast transitions (duration-150).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Monospace typing effect for SQL generation, pulsed opacity for active agent nodes.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sharp, technical appearance. 16px (w-4 h-4) standard size.

image_urls.description: Abstract 3D illustration of a glowing database server with multiple interconnected nodes pulsing with data streams. Dark minimalist background, Swiss design aesthetic. Can be used as a subtle faded background for empty states or login.
Minimalist high-contrast abstract representation of AI agents collaborating. Use in the central chat/trace area before a query is initiated.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text strictly follows APCA and WCAG AA guidelines. No gray-on-gray unreadable text.
accessibility_and_testing.test_attributes: Enforce data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='execute-query-button', data-testid='schema-table-toggle').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 3-pane IDE layout (Schema, Chat/Trace, Results). Ensure the height is h-screen overflow-hidden with individual pane scrolling.
Use purely Shadcn UI, Recharts, and Tailwind. Install 'lucide-react' for icons.
Agent Node Tracing: Visually represent the 'Schema Inspector -> SQL Writer -> Validator -> Executor -> Reflector' loop. Use the status colors provided.
Apply Archetype 4 (Swiss & High Contrast): Stark white backgrounds, 1px sharp borders, #002FA7 primary accent, IBM Plex Sans/Mono fonts.
Implement Tabs in the right panel: 'Generated SQL' (Code editor view), 'Data Table' (Shadcn Table), and 'Charts' (Recharts).
Always left-align labels and data. Avoid centering in technical dashboards.
For the empty state of the chat/trace area, use one of the provided abstract agent collaboration images, heavily faded (opacity-20).
